content.en:
In the years that followed, Ye Tian also had to cultivate the Extreme Dao and continuously improve the realm of the Extreme Dao.

Originally, Ye Tian planned to cultivate the Space Extreme Dao first, but now he changed his mind, he wanted to major in the Time Extreme Dao, because he copied the Time Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, if he cultivated the Time Extreme Dao, the speed would be very fast.

The Extreme Dao Ancestor Fu seems to have been born for the Extreme Dao, which is too suitable for contemplating the Extreme Dao.

The Time Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu allowed Ye Tian to reach an incredible level in the cultivation of the Time Extreme Dao.

"That Lord of the Stone Pupil has the Time Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, no wonder he has cultivated the Time Extreme Dao to the consummation realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

If you want to cultivate an extreme path to the consummation realm, how terrifying it is!

It can be said that among the perfect controllers of the True Realm, there are very few existences who can cultivate the Extreme Dao to the consummation realm, and only with the corresponding Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment can they easily do so.

And now, Ye Tian can also do it.

Moreover, his own talent far surpassed that of the Lord of the Stone Pupil, and he had obtained the Ancestral Endowment of the Extreme Dao of Time, so the speed at which he comprehended the Extreme Dao of Time would far exceed that of the Lord of the Stone Pupil.

Although it was difficult to comprehend the Time Extreme Dao, and many super-level perfect controllers would never even be able to comprehend the Time Extreme Dao to the Xiaocheng realm, Ye Tian had almost no bottlenecks at this moment, and it was very easy.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's time pole continued to improve.

Before you know it, tens of millions of eternal years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian found that his time was extremely small!

You must know that comprehending the Extreme Dao of Time to the realm of Xiaocheng is far more difficult than comprehending the Extreme Dao of Time, after all, comprehending the Extreme Dao of Time is like a moat for many super-perfect controllers.

"Extreme Dao Ancestor Fu is too terrifying!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

Seeing the rebellion of the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, Ye Tian wanted to copy more of the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu.

However, the concept of having the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment in the Ends of the Realm is probably too low, and there may not even be cultivators or creatures who have the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment.

However, there must be some Extreme Dao Ancestors in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

For example, those who are in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace's Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, maybe there are some who have Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment.

Of course, he didn't want to contact those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers now, mainly because it was too dangerous, for fear of being discovered as a replica body, which would not be good.

"Look for it slowly, don't force it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After the Time Pole Dao Xiaocheng, it is more difficult to ascend to the Dacheng realm, even with Ye Tian's comprehension and the Time Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, it will at least cost hundreds of millions or even a billion eternal years.

Ye Tian didn't want to spend such a long time contemplating the Extreme Dao of Time.

Moreover, it doesn't make any sense to just comprehend the Infinite Extreme Path to the Dacheng realm, unless all the Extreme Paths are raised to the Dacheng realm, so that the Endless Extreme Dao can be incredibly improved.

However, it would take too long to do that.

Therefore, it is enough for Ye Tian to prepare to comprehend these extreme paths one by one to the Xiaocheng realm, which is enough to raise the endless extreme path to the Xiaocheng realm, so that he can impact the perfect controller of the virtual realm.

"Next, comprehend the Extreme Dao of the Space!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Extreme deep sea.

On this day, Ye Tian finally learned that the Extreme Dao Demon Ape Cemetery was about to open.

However, this time it was opened, and the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace did not allow any Extreme Dao creatures to enter the main burial chamber of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape, which was the burial place of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape, the place of bones.

If the bones of an Extreme Dao creature of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace were still used by the juniors after death, then many of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace's Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers would not agree, and would even prohibit the opening of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape Graveyard.

However, with the exception of the main burial chamber, there are no restrictions on the accessibility of other places.

The Extreme Demon Ape used to have a lot of resources, and there were too many good things, most of which were brought into the cemetery, so many Extreme Demon Ape creatures were eager to enter the Extreme Demon Ape's cemetery, so as to find treasures that could improve their strength.

Not long after, Ye Tian also came to the cemetery where the Extreme Dao Demon Ape was located-the Demonless Thunder Sea.

The Demonless Thunder Sea is a very dangerous place in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, the Extreme Dao rules here are very chaotic, and ordinary super-perfect controllers can't bear the Extreme Dao rules here, once they enter, they will inevitably be hit hard.

Only the top super-level perfect controllers and the three realms perfect controllers above them dare to go deep into here.

In addition, the Demonless Thunder Sea is also the territory of the Pure Realm, the perfect controller of the True Realm, the Lord of Thunder Light, but unfortunately, not long ago, the Lord of Thunder Light accidentally fell, and other Extreme Path creatures entered the Demonless Thunder Sea, and only then did they discover the Extreme Demon Ape Graveyard.

Now, the Extreme Path creatures also know a secret, that is, the Lord of Thunder Light was once a servant of the Extreme Demon Ape, and after the Extreme Demon Ape fell, the Lord of Thunder Light guarded its cemetery.

If it weren't for the fall of the Lord of Thunder, this place wouldn't have been discovered.

......

"The Demonless Thunder Sea is very good here, for those cultivators or Extreme Dao creatures who practice and comprehend the Thunder Extreme Dao, this place is very suitable for them, although the rules of the Thunder Extreme Dao are chaotic, but as long as the strength is strong enough, you can ignore the chaotic Extreme Dao rules here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the Demonless Thunder Sea with the body of the Void Sparrow, and the endless Extreme Dao rules bombarded Ye Tian's body, without affecting him in any way.

After all, this Void Immortal Sparrow Replica Body has now been cultivated by Ye Tian to the realm of a super-perfect controller, and it also has the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment of the Underworld Body, and its potential is even further.

With the realm of this Void Sparrow body, the strength exerted is not weaker than the main body at all.

Of course, Ye Tian's strength was average compared to some of the Extreme Dao creatures who came here.

Because among the extreme creatures who came here, there were perfect controllers of the virtual realm and even perfect controllers of the true realm, and Ye Tian's strength was much worse than them.

"As long as you enter the purpose of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape, you won't lose money if you have a harvest!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, the entrance to the Extreme Demon Ape Graveyard was opened.

Bang!!!!

The void cracked, and countless extreme powers turned into an entrance.

In an instant, many Extreme Dao creatures entered this cemetery, and Ye Tian immediately entered it.

As soon as they entered the cemetery, everyone felt unimaginable oppression.

"The suppression of the Extreme Dao rules here is too strong, I am the perfect controller of the Void Realm, and my strength has been suppressed to a very low level!"

"I'm the perfect controller of the True Realm, and I've been suppressed!"

"It's the Extreme Dao Strange Treasure of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape - the Zhendao Seal, this Extreme Dao Strange Treasure plus the residual power value of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape Lord, as well as the suppression of the magic circle here, even the perfect controller of the True Realm can't compete with it. If you fight with extreme strength, the pressure will be much lower. If you want to exert your full strength, unless your strength can be comparable to that of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape!"

"Fighting against the Extreme Realm Demon Ape, that will definitely not be possible, this time the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller is not allowed to enter, and the most powerful is only the True Realm Perfect Controller, and the Extreme Dao Demon Ape Lord is among the powerful among the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers. "

"Hahaha, I have participated in many extreme paths, and the extreme realm is not low, and the strength I have exerted here is very strong!"

Ye Tian also used the power of the Time Pole to contend with it, and sure enough, he reduced the suppression, and his strength was more exerted.

At this time, he thought to himself that if he released all the power of the Extreme Dao, would he be able to exert most of his strength?

"Let's keep it low!"

Ye Tian only showed more than a dozen extreme paths, and then began to go deep into this extreme path demon ape cemetery.
